meaning: n.樵夫,居住于森林的人,看管森林的人,伐木者
examples: The woodman laughed, and said, "How can that be?"
They went up to the woodman, and asked him what he would take for the little man.
They went on into the wood, till at last they came to the place where the woodman was.
Woodman, then 27, holed up in the house he shared in Moss Beach, Calif.
To do so, Woodman hit the trade show circuit, starting at specialty sports exhibitions.
